intake.user_request: Fix the populate pipeline to extract @capability and @layer fields from semantic headers into element.capability and element.metadata.layer in the index. Currently 0/2431 elements have these fields populated despite headers being written to 198 src/ files.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single localized fix in orchestrator.ts — add 2 lines to the header-stamping loop. No new abstractions, no new files, blast radius is 1 file.

in_scope: src/pipeline/orchestrator.ts — add capability/layer propagation in header-stamp loop
